positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~contains_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~contains_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg
% SZS output start Proof for neg
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (alkane(X0) => hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) => chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. chemical_compound(mixture) => contains_one_element(mixture) [input(axiom)]
8. ~(alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~(alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture)) [negated conjecture 8]
10. alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture) [flattening 9]
11. alkane(mixture) [pure predicate removal 10]
13. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
14. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
15. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
16. ! [X0] : (~contains_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
17. contains_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture) [ennf transformation 6]
19. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
22. ~contains_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 16]
23. contains_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture) [cnf transformation 17]
25. alkane(mixture) [cnf transformation 11]
27. 1 <=> contains_one_element(mixture) [avatar definition]
28. contains_one_element(mixture) <- (1) [avatar component clause 27]
31. 2 <=> chemical_compound(mixture) [avatar definition]
32. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 31]
33. chemical_compound(mixture) <- (2) [avatar component clause 31]
35. ~2 | 1 [avatar split clause 23,27,31]
36. hydrocarbon(mixture) [resolution 20,25]
37. organic_compound(mixture) [resolution 36,19]
38. chemical_compound(mixture) [resolution 37,21]
39. $false <- (~2) [forward subsumption resolution 38,32]
40. 2 [avatar contradiction clause 39]
41. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 28,22]
42. $false <- (1, 2) [forward subsumption resolution 41,33]
43. ~1 | ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 42]
s2. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 35]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 40]
s4. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 43]
s5. ~1 [rat s4,s3]
s6. # [rat s2,s5,s3]
44. $false [avatar sat refutation s6]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
